query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "gatemem: benchmarking memory governance in multi-principal shared-memo" computer science
rationale: This paper directly addresses the user's question by providing the canonical follow-up work on "GateMem" that extends the benchmarking of memory governance in multi-principal shared-memory systems, satisfying criteria (a) for same-mechanism evidence and (b) for measuring the specific independent/dependent variables (governance primitives, failure modes) in the same domain (multi-agent LLM systems).
